originalTitle: EA SPORTS FC 27 | Official Reveal Trailer
content: Welcome to The World’s Game. EA SPORTS FC™ 27 launches 25 September. Pre-order now: https://x.ea.com/89600 Step into The Grounds to experience a football playground where the streets meet the stadium, and feel greater control in every mode as community-driven innovations deliver more true-to-football gameplay: https://x.ea.com/89601 Learn more about FC 27 Gameplay, Career, FUT, and Clubs x The Grounds when the Deep Dives series kicks off July 29th. Pre-order EA SPORTS FC 27™ Ultimate Plus Edition by 31 August: https://x.ea.com/89600 Receive up to 10,000 FC Points across 5 months, Seasons 1 - 5 of the Premium Pass, and more. EA SPORTS FC 26™ players will also receive a 92+ OVR ICON in EA SPORTS FC™ 26 Football Ultimate Team™ for immediate use and an Evolution that boosts any player’s dribbling Attributes to 99. Subscribe to see more from EA SPORTS FC™: http://bit.ly/pzw4VD #EASPORTSFC #TheWorldsGame #FC27
chineseContent: 欢迎来到世界游戏。 EA SPORTS FC™ 27 将于 9 月 25 日推出。立即预订：https://x.ea.com/89600 走进 The Grounds，体验街道与体育场交汇的足球游乐场，并在社区驱动的创新提供更真实的足球游戏玩法时，在每种模式中感受到更大的控制力：https://x.ea.com/89601 当 Deep Dives 系列于 7 月 29 日开始时，了解有关 FC 27 游戏玩法、职业、FUT 和 Clubs x The Grounds 的更多信息。在 8 月 31 日之前预订 EA SPORTS FC 27™ Ultimate Plus 版：https://x.ea.com/89600 在 5 个月、高级通行证第 1 - 5 季等期间获得最多 10,000 个 FC 积分。 EA SPORTS FC 26™ 玩家还将在 EA SPORTS FC™ 26 Football Ultimate Team™ 中获得 92+ OVR 图标以供立即使用，以及将任何玩家的运球属性提升至 99 的进化。订阅以查看 EA SPORTS FC™ 的更多信息：http://bit.ly/pzw4VD #EASPORTSFC #TheWorldsGame #FC27
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
